name: Beginner KB Strength Builder
description: Simple full-body strength workout with one kettlebell. Four foundational exercises — swings, squats, presses, rows — for 5 rounds. Super easy to progress by adding weight or reps week over week. 30-40 minutes.

exercises.notes: Two-hand swing. Explosive hip snap, arms straight. Chest height.
Hold bell at chest. Elbows between knees at the bottom. Full depth.
Close grip floor press. Both hands on the bell. Control the negative.
10 each side. Flat back, squeeze at the top. Alternate each rep.

tips: Only need ONE kettlebell for the entire workout
Start with a weight you can goblet squat comfortably for 12
Progress by adding reps first (10 to 12), then up the weight
Can run as a circuit or do straight sets if you prefer more rest
Pairs well with other training — throw it in 2-3x per week
